ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
((ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "UK") || ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, "US")) &&
NOT(Subsidiary_Address_Override__c) && Nb_of_won_opps__c >= 1 && ( (BillingCountry='United States' && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, 'US'))) || (BillingCountry='United Kingdom' && NOT(ISPICKVAL(CV_Subsidiary__c, 'UK'))) )) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please amend the 'Eficode Subsidiary' field to match the customer location. If strictly necessary speak to an admin who can apply 'Address/Currency Override'
